name: Seafood Bisque
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces salt pork or 1/4 cup butter
10-1/2 ounce condensed cream of celery soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain clams, shrimp, and crab meat. Reserve liquids.
2. In a large pot, brown salt pork until fat is released.
3. Add onions and potatoes and sauté, stirring frequently for about 10 minutes.
4. Add condensed cream of celery soup, milk from the can, 1 1/2 cups milk, boiling water, reserved liquids, and curry. Cover and simmer over low heat for 25 minutes.
5. Add clams, shrimp, crab meat, and thyme. Cook for 5 minutes.
6. Mix together the remaining cream and cornstarch. Stir into the bisque constantly until just at boiling point, without boiling.
7. Season to taste. Lower the heat and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
